notes: Keep Phase 8 GitHub views action-family-oriented so operators can reason about one mutation class at a time.
Reuse the Phase 6 and Phase 7 databases instead of creating a second GitHub-specific ledger.

views.name: Issue Creates
views.purpose: Review create-issue requests from dry run through execution.
views.configure: FILTER "Policy" CONTAINS "github.create_issue"; SHOW "Name", "Status", "Execution Intent", "Target Source", "Latest Execution", "Execution Notes"; SORT BY "Requested At" DESC

views.name: Issue Updates
views.purpose: Review issue update requests and their target numbers.
views.configure: FILTER "Policy" CONTAINS "github.update_issue"; SHOW "Name", "Status", "Target Number", "Latest Execution", "Execution Notes"; SORT BY "Requested At" DESC

views.name: Issue Labels
views.purpose: Review label-sync requests and their target label sets.
views.configure: FILTER "Policy" CONTAINS "github.set_issue_labels"; SHOW "Name", "Status", "Target Number", "Target Labels", "Latest Execution"; SORT BY "Requested At" DESC

views.name: Issue Assignees
views.purpose: Review assignee-sync requests and their target assignee sets.
views.configure: FILTER "Policy" CONTAINS "github.set_issue_assignees"; SHOW "Name", "Status", "Target Number", "Target Assignees", "Latest Execution"; SORT BY "Requested At" DESC

views.name: Issue Comments
views.purpose: Review issue-comment requests and comment payloads.
views.configure: FILTER "Policy" CONTAINS "github.add_issue_comment"; SHOW "Name", "Status", "Target Number", "Latest Execution", "Execution Notes"; SORT BY "Requested At" DESC

views.name: PR Comments
views.purpose: Review PR conversation comment requests and their execution state.
views.configure: FILTER "Policy" CONTAINS "github.comment_pull_request"; SHOW "Name", "Status", "Target Number", "Latest Execution", "Execution Notes"; SORT BY "Requested At" DESC

views.name: Failures
views.purpose: Review requests whose latest GitHub execution needs operator attention.
views.configure: FILTER "Latest Execution Status" = "Problem"; SHOW "Name", "Policy", "Target Source", "Latest Execution", "Execution Notes"; SORT BY "Requested At" DESC

views.name: Live Successes
views.purpose: Review successful live GitHub executions and their response classifications.
views.configure: FILTER "Mode" = "Live"; FILTER "Status" = "Succeeded"; SHOW "Name", "Action Key", "Issue Number", "Comment ID", "Response Classification", "Reconcile Status", "Provider URL"; SORT BY "Executed At" DESC

views.name: Failures
views.purpose: Review failed GitHub executions with clear classifications and compensation posture.
views.configure: FILTER "Status" = "Failed"; SHOW "Name", "Action Key", "Response Classification", "Failure Notes", "Compensation Plan"; SORT BY "Executed At" DESC

views.name: Reconcile Needed
views.purpose: Review executions whose GitHub feedback loop has not yet confirmed the write outcome.
views.configure: FILTER "Reconcile Status" = "Pending"; SHOW "Name", "Action Key", "Issue Number", "Comment ID", "Reconcile Status", "Provider URL"; SORT BY "Executed At" DESC

views.name: GitHub Targets Ready
views.purpose: Review active GitHub repo sources that are ready for the deeper Phase 8 GitHub lane.
views.configure: FILTER "Provider" = "GitHub"; FILTER "Status" = "Active"; SHOW "Name", "Provider", "Status", "Source URL"; SORT BY "Name" ASC
